1: use bench_fixture::is_valid_ipv4;
2: 
3: #[test]
4: fn accepts_valid_addresses() {
5:     assert!(is_valid_ipv4("192.168.1.1"));
6:     assert!(is_valid_ipv4("0.0.0.0"));
7:     assert!(is_valid_ipv4("255.255.255.255"));
8:     assert!(is_valid_ipv4("10.0.0.1"));
9: }
10: 
11: #[test]
12: fn rejects_too_many_octets() {
13:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.2.3.4.5"));
14: }
15: 
16: #[test]
17: fn rejects_few_octets() {
18:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.2.3"));
19:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1"));
20: }
21: 
22: #[test]
23: fn rejects_out_of_range() {
24:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("256.1.1.1"));
25:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.256.1.1"));
26:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.1.1.256"));
27: }
28: 
29: #[test]
30: fn rejects_non_numeric() {
31:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("a.b.c.d"));
32:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.2.3.a"));
33: }
34: 
35: #[test]
36: fn rejects_leading_zeros() {
37:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("01.1.1.1"));
38:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.001.1.1"));
39: }
40: 
41: #[test]
42: fn rejects_empty_and_garbage() {
43:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4(""));
44:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("..."));
45:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4("1.2.3."));
46:     assert!(!is_valid_ipv4(".1.2.3"));
47: }
